textByHash.305fe9473070f5bd8be370291d4236e1c75023a6: Very interesting. Unfortunately I don't think I have any giant eagle costumes in stock at the moment.
textByHash.437cba33310f0543f9eb1da19a084f9856f34ae9: Certainly. Take a look at my range of made-to-order items. If you can supply the furs, I'll gladly make any of these for you.
textByHash.5cbab74444ba2362a02d559da7df33b1513e3ece: Well I suppose you can have this old one. It's not in good enough condition to sell.
textByHash.5e57b1a71b80ce79c5f150c569db2fae6a6f63d2: Well, feel free to come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.6928976894e68be31a1d58b67aa9aa508af81053: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.
textByHash.6e70a0ded3365359b5d871ff3dbe739d2ccaecce: Well, there was some chap in desert clothing. He said his name was Ali. He assured me they were giant eagle feathers, although when I come to think about it they were suspiciously similar to chicken feathers.
textByHash.77e4262d9b682cb8c1f7b55802341eae26dc30bb: Anyway, you're probably looking at about 10 giant eagle feathers, assuming you can find a nest.
textByHash.7a12a8c8ca0961b1ec2153a842e8264420ad052a: Well, some more colourful feathers might be useful. For some surreal reason, all I normally seem to get offered are large quantities of rather beaten-up looking chicken feathers.
textByHash.85dd1c78de2fc3885edbcbeb2857ce7db148f18d: Ah, an inspired choice. What kind of bird were you thinking of?
textByHash.86e03f87f4f0f5b2b95adf0d20bacbf55ac68f07: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.
textByHash.8fa38c5d1151edf6f269f096e879b967210dcf19: I should be able to knock something up if you get me 10 of the right sort of feather. I'll also need some swamp tar and some yellow dye.
textByHash.9a019a03010d9712a8000ed3a0c41afe7c71f83a: People must have some very strange pastimes around these parts, that's all I can say.
textByHash.a0637981f761a701adc8a175ad43cf609f4c1a18: Of course if I had the materials I could make them for you.
textByHash.a4d44cd207b9087c0685c677db56a09a054c5530: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.
textByHash.ac78d766dbdbff930e9764f96c42f272e4cea3fa: Certainly, if you can supply the materials. I'll need appropriate feathers, swamp tar and some yellow dye. It'll also cost you 25 gold pieces.
textByHash.b2768399278ea6fa6642f43a745a1775604d52b8: Well I do sell them. I don't hand them out for free though. This is a shop not a charity.
textByHash.cd17df5dbfc83fa79ebef85e802aee73d39c6079: Well, the main problem is that I'm fresh out of giant eagle feathers. I've been meaning to get onto my supplier about that for some time.
textByHash.d57c02dac99955d3ecc745a03b73641d171c3bb7: There we go; two eagle costumes. You should be the envy of the entire party with those.
textByHash.dcb98609b04e13163df7d8ed84f964f0ad21d169: Sorry, we're closed at the moment.
textByHash.e849e2bf1a0c0dec24c66e435292477de97ad582: Certainly. It'll also cost you 50 gold pieces.
textByHash.e8962e86be2f7b412231f5cb6c5c428a9f53e54d: I'd also need some swamp tar to hold things together and some yellow dye for the beaks. Everything else I can supply myself.
